summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and has no shared canonical; all hydrated open PRs are classified independently with no close, merge, label, comment, or fix action planned. The preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive job refs.

actions.reason: Feature PR with its own scope and failing checks; keep open as independent inventory item.
Small extension configuration PR with unique scope and an affected failing check; keep independent.
Telegram proof instrumentation PR has unique implementation scope and unresolved proof failure; keep independent.
Draft Teams action-gate PR with its own channel scope; keep independent and avoid mutating action.
Focused performance PR with sufficient proof but merge disabled in this plan job; keep independent.
Maintainer-owned broad performance bucket with failing checks; no closure or merge action is appropriate.
Maintainer-owned broad normalization PR has its own scope and cannot be merged in this job; keep independent.
Skills PR has a unique problem statement and should not be closed or merged by this inventory shard.
Small docs PR with unique scope; keep independent without close or merge recommendation.
Narrow channel bugfix PR has failing proof/checks and a unique linked issue scope; keep independent.
Config/gateway tuning PR has distinct scope and unresolved proof signal; keep independent.
Test PR with unique Google/Gemini replay coverage and proof failure; keep independent.
Provider-wrapper PR has independent implementation scope; partial check hydration prevents merge consideration but not classification.
Gateway responsiveness PR has unique scope and no closure basis; keep independent.
Large Feishu message-delivery PR has distinct channel scope and unresolved review/check preflight; keep independent.
Draft maintainer plugin fix with unique scope; keep independent.
